About Me

Data tells a story — I make it speak

With a strong foundation in analytics and a passion for problem-solving, I help businesses extract meaningful insights from their data. My approach combines technical rigor with clear communication — because the best analysis means nothing if it can't be understood.

I've worked across industries including e-commerce, finance, healthcare, and marketing — delivering dashboards, cleaning messy datasets, building predictive models, and automating reports that save teams hours every week.

Based in the United States of America and available globally, I bring a client-first mindset and a commitment to delivering quality, on time, every time.

Selected Work

Case Studies

Real client and analyst projects — from winery sales to global startup ecosystems. Click any project to explore the full output.

01
Mandy's Winery — Sales Performance Analysis
Analysed 300 sales transactions across 13 Nigerian states and 11 sales reps to uncover geographic concentration, seasonal revenue dips, and a 361× performance gap between top and bottom salespeople.
Excel · Pivot Tables · SUMIFS
FMCG / Sales
View Spreadsheet
Key Findings
  • Total Revenue: NGN 1,240,884 across 45,661 units sold
  • Edo State led revenue at NGN 129,507 — Oyo lagged at NGN 53,585
  • Top salesperson outperformed bottom by 361× in Ogun State
  • October posted lowest monthly revenue — 47% below August peak
  • Gross margin ~69% but Ogun State carried a 53% cost ratio vs Osun's 21%
Recommendations Delivered
  • Territory rebalancing with dedicated managers for low-revenue states
  • Formal PIP system with automated COUNTIFS-driven monthly leaderboards
  • Seasonal promotional push from September to pre-load Q4 orders
  • Product rationalization — discontinue lowest-margin SKUs
02
Unicorn Companies — Global Startup Ecosystem Analysis
Built an interactive Excel dashboard analysing 1,000+ unicorn companies across 15+ industries and 6 continents — uncovering a $197.8B funding bubble in 2021 and a persistent 48% valuation gap for African startups.
Excel · Dashboard · Pivot Charts
Global / Fintech
View Dashboard
Key Findings
  • Fintech dominates with 224 unicorns; Travel sector has only 14
  • 2021 funding hit $197.8B — then collapsed 82% to $35.6B in 2022
  • Africa avg valuation index: 48.23% vs North America's 99.84%
  • Health (74) and Edtech (28) severely underfunded relative to demand
  • Supply Chain & Data Analytics — fastest-growing but under-recognized
Recommendations Delivered
  • Rebalance VC portfolios — cap Fintech/E-commerce below 40%
  • Sustainability scorecard for 2021-vintage unicorns facing correction
  • Dedicated Africa & South America investment vehicles
  • Redirect post-correction capital into Health and Edtech sectors
03
Sales Performance & Customer Analytics — Power BI Dashboard
Built a multi-page Power BI dashboard tracking $24.9M revenue, 25,164 orders, 17,416 customers, and geographic sales distribution — with drill-through navigation, KPI cards, and executive reporting for leadership teams.
Power BI · DAX · Power Query

04
Loan Portfolio Analysis — SQL (T-SQL / CTE)
Wrote advanced T-SQL queries using CTEs to aggregate loan payment data — computing total payments, installments, interest, and default penalties across a multi-million dollar loan portfolio per loan number.
T-SQL · CTE · SQL Server
Finance / Banking
View Query
Query Output Preview
What This Query Does
  • CTE aggregates loan-level totals from [dbo].[Loanperiodic]
  • Computes SUM of extra payments, installments, interest, and penalties
  • Output formatted with FORMAT(..., 'C2') for currency display
  • Results span multi-million dollar loan numbers (e.g. $26.8M installment for loan 00324)
Skills Demonstrated
CTE GROUP BY SUM aggregation FORMAT T-SQL Financial Reporting

How I Work

My Process

01
Discover
We start with a clear brief — understanding your business context, data sources, and the decisions you need to make.
02
Analyse
I clean, explore, and model your data — asking the right questions and finding patterns that matter for your goals.
03
Visualise
Findings become clear, interactive visuals — dashboards, charts, and reports designed for your specific audience.
04
Deliver
You receive documented, ready-to-use deliverables with a walkthrough — plus support after handover if needed.
